mapper.select: SELECT id, hospital_no, patient_id, attending_doctor_id, ward_id, bed_id, admission_date, discharge_date, status FROM hospitalization
SELECT id, hospital_no, patient_id, attending_doctor_id, ward_id, bed_id, admission_date, discharge_date, status FROM hospitalization WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, hospital_no, patient_id, attending_doctor_id, ward_id, bed_id, admission_date, discharge_date, status FROM hospitalization WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY admission_date DESC
SELECT id, hospital_no, patient_id, attending_doctor_id, ward_id, bed_id, admission_date, discharge_date, status FROM hospitalization WHERE status = 'IN_HOSPITAL'

SELECT id, hospital_no, patient_id, attending_doctor_id, ward_id, bed_id, admission_date, discharge_date, status FROM hospitalization WHERE attending_doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY admission_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hospitalization (hospital_no, patient_id, attending_doctor_id, ward_id, bed_id, admission_date, discharge_date, status) VALUES (#{hospitalNo}, #{patientId}, #{attendingDoctorId}, #{wardId}, #{bedId}, #{admissionDate}, #{dischargeDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE hospitalization SET hospital_no = #{hospitalNo}, patient_id = #{patientId}, attending_doctor_id = #{attendingDoctorId}, ward_id = #{wardId}, bed_id = #{bedId}, admission_date = #{admissionDate}, discharge_date = #{dischargeDate}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
